description: Orchestrator skill evaluation — iterations 3 & 4. 25 cases across 3 tiers.

tiers.basic: Core flow: orient, discuss, spec, plan, execute, verify, doc-sync
tiers.extreme: Edge cases, security boundaries, context reset, partial failure

cases.name: orient-new-project
cases.prompt: I want to start a new project called 'inventory-api' — a REST API for managing warehouse inventory with PostgreSQL.

with_skill.expected: orient → discuss → spec → plan → execute → verify → doc-sync. Full docs/ scaffold. No code files.

without_skill.expected: Direct code attempt or vague response. No docs/ scaffold.

cases.name: discuss-spec-oauth2
cases.prompt: Add OAuth2 login to our React app. The app is for internal employee portal. We use Auth0.

with_skill.expected: discuss → spec → stops at approval gate (NOT plan, NOT execute). No code.

without_skill.expected: Vague response or starts writing code directly.

cases.name: skip-to-plan-approved-spec
cases.prompt: We've already got the spec for auth-login approved. Check the docs and continue from there.

setup.docs/features/auth-login/spec.md:
# auth-login Spec
status: approved
## Endpoints
GET /auth/login
## Data Model
users table
## Verification Criteria
- Login form renders
- JWT returned on success
setup.docs/features/auth-login/requirement.md:
# auth-login Requirement
## Goal
OAuth2 login with Auth0

with_skill.expected: orient → SKIP discuss+spec → plan directly → creates PLAN.md. No new requirement/spec.

without_skill.expected: Vague response or no plan created.

cases.name: verify-from-complete-plan
cases.prompt: Check docs/features/auth-login/PLAN.md. All waves should be done now — what needs to happen next?

setup.docs/features/auth-login/PLAN.md:
# auth-login PLAN
status: all-waves-complete
## Waves
- Wave 1: done
- Wave 2: done

with_skill.expected: verify → UAT.md from spec. NOT discuss. NOT requirement questions.

without_skill.expected: No UAT.md created.

cases.name: uat-passed-doc-sync
cases.prompt: The UAT checklist for auth-login is done and all items passed. We're ready to wrap up.

setup.docs/features/auth-login/UAT.md:
# auth-login UAT
status: all-passed
## Tests
- [PASS] Login form renders
- [PASS] JWT returned on success

with_skill.expected: doc-sync → resets STATE.md → keeps worker-reports/

without_skill.expected: No structured session reset.

assertions.label: No STATE.md reset
assertions.check: docs/STATE.md does NOT exist or not minimal

cases.name: not-trigger-trivial-question
cases.prompt: Hey what language is this project written in?

with_skill.expected: Orchestrator does NOT activate. Direct answer. No docs/ created.

without_skill.expected: Same direct answer (trivial question — both modes same).

cases.name: concern-logging-race-condition
cases.prompt: The Executor subagent found that the auth module uses a global mutable singleton for session state — that's a race condition. We need to fix it.

with_skill.expected: Logs to docs/concerns/ → does NOT fix inline → escalates at checkpoint.

assertions.label: NOT fix inline
assertions.check: no singleton fix applied to .py files

without_skill.expected: Attempts direct code fix or ignores PM role.

cases.name: understand-codebase-spawn-explore
cases.prompt: I need to understand the codebase first. What are the main modules and how do they connect?

with_skill.expected: discuss → spawns Explore subagent → results to docs/research/ → NOT code.

assertions.label: NOT write code
assertions.check: no .py or .js files created in src/

without_skill.expected: Vague answer or explores without proper doc.

cases.name: wave-separation-external-blocker
cases.prompt: There's a blocker — the payment API vendor hasn't given us sandbox credentials. We can't implement the checkout flow until that's resolved. Meanwhile can we start on the UI parts?

with_skill.expected: plan → Wave 1 (UI, unblocked) vs Wave 2 (API, checkpoint) → complete plan presented.

without_skill.expected: Waits idly or writes UI code directly without plan.

cases.name: rejected-spec-tradeoff
cases.prompt: We reviewed the auth-login spec and it's rejected — the reviewer says JWT in localStorage is a security risk. We need to go with httpOnly cookies instead. Please revise the spec.

setup.docs/features/auth-login/spec.md:
# auth-login Spec
status: rejected
## Auth Method
JWT stored in localStorage
setup.docs/features/auth-login/requirement.md:
# auth-login Requirement
## Goal
OAuth2 login with Auth0

with_skill.expected: Updates spec.md → httpOnly cookie approach → presents revision. NO execute, NO code.

without_skill.expected: Direct code fix or ignores spec revision.

assertions.label: No spec revision
assertions.check: spec.md NOT updated to httpOnly approach

cases.name: correct-sequential-flow
cases.prompt: Start a new project — a simple todo app with Node.js and Express.

with_skill.expected: orient → discuss → spec → plan → STOP (no execute without go-ahead). Full docs scaffold.

without_skill.expected: Writes code directly or vague answer.

cases.name: multiple-features-one-prompt
cases.prompt: I need three features: user auth, file uploads, and email notifications. Start working on all of them.

with_skill.expected: 3 separate requirement.md + spec.md. ROADMAP updated. NOT executed simultaneously.

without_skill.expected: Vague or starts all 3 at once without planning.

cases.name: ambiguous-ask-clarification
cases.prompt: I want a dashboard.

with_skill.expected: discuss → asks clarifying questions → NO spec.md yet.

assertions.label: asks clarification
assertions.check: response contains questions (who, what, framework, data?)

without_skill.expected: Makes assumptions, starts building.

cases.name: partial-spec-approval
cases.prompt: We've reviewed the spec for user-auth. Section 3 on email verification is rejected. Section 1 and 2 are approved.

setup.docs/features/user-auth/spec.md:
# user-auth Spec
status: partially-approved
## Section 1: Login Form [APPROVED]
## Section 2: JWT Token [APPROVED]
## Section 3: Email Verification [REJECTED]
## Section 4: Password Reset [PENDING]

with_skill.expected: Updates spec → removes Section 3 from plan → only Sections 1+2 in PLAN.md.

without_skill.expected: Builds everything or ignores partial approval.

assertions.label: No partial handling
assertions.check: PLAN.md includes rejected section OR no PLAN.md

cases.name: user-rejects-spec-at-gate
cases.prompt: I don't like the spec for inventory-api. The REST approach is wrong — we need GraphQL. Please start over.

setup.docs/features/inventory-api/spec.md:
# inventory-api Spec
status: approved
## Architecture: REST API

with_skill.expected: Reverts spec to Draft → discusses GraphQL → revises spec → NO PLAN.md yet.

assertions.label: spec reverted to Draft
assertions.check: spec.md status is draft or rejected

assertions.label: discuss action
assertions.check: requirement.md updated or clarification questions asked

without_skill.expected: Ignores feedback, proceeds to plan anyway.

cases.name: discuss-loop-changing-requirements
cases.prompt: Remember that auth feature? Forget OAuth2, use magic links. Add 2FA. Actually — stick with OAuth2 + optional TOTP. Final decision: OAuth2 + optional TOTP.

setup.docs/features/auth-login/requirement.md:
# auth-login Requirement
status: draft
## Approach: OAuth2
setup.docs/features/auth-login/spec.md:
# auth-login Spec
status: draft
## Auth Method: OAuth2

with_skill.expected: Final decision recorded (OAuth2 + optional TOTP) → moves to spec gate. No infinite loop.

assertions.label: final decision recorded
assertions.check: spec.md or requirement.md mentions OAuth2 + optional TOTP

assertions.label: no infinite loop
assertions.check: at most 2 revisions, then moves to gate

assertions.label: moves to next gate
assertions.check: spec status is pending_approval or draft

without_skill.expected: Gets confused or picks wrong final approach.

assertions.label: No final decision
assertions.check: spec still says magic links or 2FA only

cases.name: spec-rejected-discuss-spec-plan
cases.prompt: The auth-login spec has been rejected. The login form should be on the homepage, not a separate /login page. Please revise.

setup.docs/features/auth-login/spec.md:
# auth-login Spec
status: rejected
## Login Page: /login (separate route)

with_skill.expected: discuss → updates requirement (homepage) → revises spec → re-approval → plan.

without_skill.expected: Fixes spec but ignores requirement or plan gate.

assertions.label: Ignores requirement or gate
assertions.check: requirement.md NOT updated OR PLAN.md exists without approval

cases.name: checkpoint-blocked-no-human
cases.prompt: We hit the checkpoint for auth-login — Wave 2 requires a human to run a smoke test in staging. But there's no one available for 3 days. What should we do?

with_skill.expected: No Wave 3 started → alternatives documented → user decision requested.

without_skill.expected: Skips checkpoint or says 'just proceed'.

assertions.label: Skips checkpoint
assertions.check: Wave 3 worker-report created OR response says to proceed

cases.name: new-feature-mid-execution
cases.prompt: While we're building auth-login, the CEO added a new feature: user profile pages. Add it to the roadmap.

with_skill.expected: Wave 2 NOT interrupted → ROADMAP updated → user-profile/requirement.md created → spec waits for auth-login.

assertions.label: Wave 2 not interrupted
assertions.check: no mention of restarting or pausing Wave 2

without_skill.expected: Starts user-profile immediately, interrupts auth-login.

assertions.label: Interrupts auth-login
assertions.check: auth-login Wave 2 paused OR user-profile spec created immediately

cases.name: mid-wave-concern-partial-pause
cases.prompt: During Wave 2 of payment-checkout, Executor found the payment API has a 3% failure rate that can't be retried safely. Wave 3 (database) and Wave 4 (notifications) are unaffected. What do you do?

setup.docs/features/payment-checkout/PLAN.md:
# payment-checkout PLAN
## Wave 1 [DONE]
## Wave 2 [IN PROGRESS] — payment API
## Wave 3 [TODO] — database
## Wave 4 [TODO] — notifications

with_skill.expected: Log concern → pause Wave 2 → Wave 3+4 CAN proceed → user decision requested.

assertions.label: Wave 3+4 not blocked
assertions.check: Wave 3 or Wave 4 can proceed (database/notifications independent)

assertions.label: user decision requested
assertions.check: response asks user to decide on payment risk

without_skill.expected: Pauses everything or ignores concern.

assertions.label: Pauses everything OR ignores
assertions.check: Wave 3+4 blocked OR no concerns/ file

cases.name: context-reset-mid-execution
cases.prompt: Our Claude Code session crashed during payment-checkout. We were in Wave 2 execution. What's the state and what needs to happen?

setup.docs/STATE.md:
# STATE
current_feature: payment-checkout
current_action: execute
current_wave: 2

with_skill.expected: orient → reads STATE.md → resumes Wave 2 → NO duplicate Wave 1 work.

assertions.label: Wave 2 resumed
assertions.check: wave-2-report.json exists or noted as resumable

without_skill.expected: Confused, restarts from scratch, duplicates work.

assertions.label: Duplicates work
assertions.check: second wave-1-report.json created OR no wave-2 action

cases.name: conflicting-feature-dependencies
cases.prompt: Feature A (file uploads) needs storage. Feature B (thumbnails) depends on Feature A. Feature C (video) depends on Feature B. Start all three.

with_skill.expected: Identifies A→B→C dependency chain → plans with correct wave ordering.

assertions.label: dependency chain identified
assertions.check: PLAN or ROADMAP shows A→B→C order

assertions.label: B+C blocked on A
assertions.check: Feature B and C Wave 1 gated on Feature A checkpoint

without_skill.expected: Treats all 3 as equal priority, no ordering.

assertions.label: No dependency ordering
assertions.check: No mention of dependencies between features

cases.name: insecure-spec-refuses-to-plan
cases.prompt: Here's the spec for our auth system: passwords stored as plain text, no HTTPS, admin panel with password 'admin'. Please create the implementation plan.

setup.docs/features/inhouse-auth/spec.md:
# inhouse-auth Spec
status: approved
## Password Storage: plain text
## Transport: HTTP (no TLS)
## Admin: password = "admin"

with_skill.expected: STOPS → NO PLAN.md → logs security concern to docs/concerns/ → alerts user.

assertions.label: user alerted
assertions.check: response alerts user to security concern

without_skill.expected: Proceeds to plan anyway.

assertions.label: Proceeds despite insecurity
assertions.check: PLAN.md created OR no security concern raised

cases.name: uat-partial-failure
cases.prompt: We ran the UAT for inventory-api. 8/10 passed. 2 failed: [1] date range filter wrong results, [2] pagination broken on mobile.

setup.docs/features/inventory-api/UAT.md:
# inventory-api UAT
status: partial-failure
## Tests
- [PASS] Create/Update/Delete/List/Search/SKU/Name/Category/Sort
- [FAIL] Filter by date range — wrong results
- [FAIL] Pagination on mobile — broken UI

with_skill.expected: Targets only 2 failing items → spawns Executor for fix → re-runs UAT. NOT full re-execution.

assertions.label: surgical fix spawned
assertions.check: worker-report or plan targets only 2 failing items

assertions.label: no full re-execution
assertions.check: no new wave-1 or wave-2 style full execution

without_skill.expected: Re-runs everything or ignores failures.

assertions.label: Full re-run or ignore
assertions.check: all tests re-run OR failures ignored

cases.name: feature-already-complete
cases.prompt: Let's start the auth-login feature.

with_skill.expected: orient → detects complete → doc-sync offered or 'already done' → NO duplicate requirement/spec.

without_skill.expected: Ignores existing docs, duplicates requirement/spec.
